sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n26348" key="dia/yeusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διά-ψευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n26348.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">deceit,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.7.111</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
